_README: JARVIS user settings template. The live file lives at data/user_settings.json (gitignored); tools/settings_window.py creates it from these defaults on first run, and the tray Settings menu edits it. You may copy this to data/user_settings.json and hand-edit, but the GUI is the supported path. NEVER put secrets (API keys, passwords) here or in data/user_settings.json — secrets belong in your .env / OS environment. The _status_* integration rows in the GUI only check whether those env vars are PRESENT; they never read or store the values. Defaults below mirror core/config.py.
